sourcePrompt: A two-man foxhole fighting position, a rectangular hole about two meters by one, dug shoulder-deep. A low parapet of sandbags rims the front lip, a dirt firing step runs inside the forward wall, and the spoil is heaped loosely behind the rear edge. Dark turned earth and a handful of worn sandbags, simple and grim. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
